text: This is the VOA Special English Technology Report.
zh: [0] 这里是美国之音特别英语科技报道。

text: Microsoft has announced its first tablet computer.
zh: [1] 微软宣布推出其首款平板电脑。

text: The device, called the Surface, is designed to compete directly with the popular iPad.
zh: [2] 这款名为Surface的设备旨在与广受欢迎的iPad正面竞争。

text: The computer software maker announced its new tablet in June at a media event in Los Angeles.
zh: [3] 这家电脑软件制造商于6月在洛杉矶的一场媒体活动上发布了这款新平板电脑。

text: Microsoft will offer two versions of the Surface. Each has a different processor.
zh: [4] 微软将推出两个版本的Surface,每个版本配备不同的处理器。

text: The Surface for Windows RT runs on an ARM processor.
zh: [5] Windows RT版Surface采用ARM处理器。

text: It is less powerful than the Surface for Windows 8 Pro, which uses an Intel processor.
zh: [6] 它的性能不及采用英特尔处理器的Windows 8 Pro版Surface强大。

text: The RT is also thinner and weighs less than the Pro.
zh: [7] RT版也比Pro版更薄更轻。

text: Either tablet weighs no more than about 900 grams.
zh: [8] 两款平板电脑的重量都不超过约900克。

text: Both have screens that are about 27 centimeters in size.
zh: [9] 两者的屏幕尺寸都约为27厘米。

text: That is a little bigger than the iPad screen.
zh: [10] 这比iPad的屏幕稍大一些。

text: Microsoft has not said exactly when the new Surface will appear in stores.
zh: [11] 微软尚未明确表示新款Surface将于何时上市销售,

text: but it is expected to be sometime in September or October.
zh: [12] 但预计会在9月或10月的某个时候。

text: This is about the same time that the company plans to release its new Windows 8
zh: [13] 这大约与该公司计划发布新款Windows 8

text: computer operating system. Brenda Estrella owns a laptop computer.
zh: [14] 电脑操作系统的时间相同。布伦达·埃斯特雷利亚拥有一台笔记本电脑。

text: She has been considering switching to a tablet.
zh: [15] 她一直在考虑换成平板电脑。

text: She says for her, the iPad is more of an entertainment device.
zh: [16] 她说,对她而言,iPad更像是一款娱乐设备。

text: In her words, if Microsoft is coming out with a tablet
zh: [17] 用她的话说,如果微软推出一款平板电脑,

text: that actually you can type and actually do different things
zh: [18] 真正能够打字,能够做一些

text: other than just swipe, then that would be better.
zh: [19] 除了滑动屏幕之外的其他事情,那就会更好。

text: Many technology Lovers, including Catherine Clinch, are excited about the new device.
zh: [20] 包括凯瑟琳·克林奇在内的许多科技爱好者对这款新设备感到兴奋。

text: She points out that the surface stands by itself, so you don't have to buy a stand.
zh: [21] 她指出,Surface可以自己立起来,所以你不必另买支架。

text: Also there is a keyboard that can also act as a cover.
zh: [22] 而且它还配有一个可以当作保护套使用的键盘。

text: Those are all wonderful things, she says, but what interests her most
zh: [23] 她说,这些都很棒,但最让她感兴趣的是,

text: is the potential to get rid of the netbook,
zh: [24] 有可能摆脱上网本,

text: to get rid of the laptop, to maybe even down the line get rid of the full computer.
zh: [25] 摆脱笔记本电脑,甚至将来有可能摆脱台式电脑。

text: Fox Van Allen is a technology expert.
zh: [26] 福克斯·范·艾伦是一位科技专家。

text: He agrees the Surface seems to have more to offer than the iPad.
zh: [27] 他也认为Surface似乎比iPad提供了更多功能。

text: He says it's a device that that almost serves as a replacement for a PC.
zh: [28] 他说,这款设备几乎可以替代个人电脑。

text: The Surface is meant to compete with the iPad, but not everyone is sure it is a better product.
zh: [29] Surface旨在与iPad竞争,但并非所有人都确信它是更好的产品。

text: John Ayala says he is glad there is a competitor, but he is sticking with his iPad.
zh: [30] 约翰·阿亚拉说,他很高兴市场上出现了竞争者,但他仍然坚持使用自己的iPad。

text: For years, Microsoft has made software,
zh: [31] 多年来,微软一直专注于制造软件,

text: not computers. A few earlier attempts by the company
zh: [32] 而非电脑硬件。该公司此前几次

text: to make and sell hardware products failed.
zh: [33] 制造和销售硬件产品的尝试都以失败告终。

text: That includes the Zune music player. It could not compete against Apple's iPod.
zh: [34] 其中包括Zune音乐播放器,它无法与苹果的iPod竞争。

text: Estimates place the value of the tablet computer market at about $79 billion this year.
zh: [35] 据估计,今年平板电脑市场的价值约为790亿美元。

text: Microsoft hopes to capture a share of that market with its latest device.
zh: [36] 微软希望凭借其最新设备在这一市场中分得一杯羹。

text: For VOA Special English, I'm Mario Ritter.
zh: [37] 这里是美国之音特别英语,我是马里奥·里特。
